div.head: The Minister in Iran (Dreyfus) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 947. Department’s 441, August 26. Millspaugh states that Deputies of Medjliss desire assurance regarding the security which is to be pledged in connection with Treasury’s proposed agreement. Accordingly he wishes to expand final sentence of draft law transmitted in Department’s telegram under reference to read “The Ministry of Finance and the Bank Mellie Iran are further authorized to take such action directly or indirectly as may be necessary or desirable to carry out such agreement, without however having the right to pledge any specific revenues or assets of the Iranian Government or of the Bank Mellie Iran, except gold or dollars equal in amount to the rials purchased by the United States Treasury under this agreement”.

Millspaugh would like to know as soon as possible whether the Treasury Department sees any objection to this addition, since the draft law is now under discussion by the Cabinet preparatory to its submission to Medjliss.
